categories.title: AI Chat
categories.blurb: How to talk to BUILD MEP — modes, navigation, the chat panel itself.

categories.title: Model Set Up
categories.blurb: Get a fresh project ready — views, templates, sheets, schedules.

categories.title: Discipline Design
categories.blurb: End-to-end design jobs across MEP disciplines.

categories.title: QA
categories.blurb: Catch problems before they leave the office. Drawings, specifications, schedules, model warnings, clashes.

categories.title: Calculations
categories.blurb: Pipe sizing, duct sizing, heat loss, cooling load, lighting calcs.

categories.title: BIM
categories.blurb: COBie, BIM compliance, drawing numbering, family swaps.

categories.title: Document Control
categories.blurb: Drawing revisions, drawing export, document control workflows.

categories.title: Specifications
categories.blurb: Generate MEP specifications straight from the model.

categories.title: Schedules
categories.blurb: Schedule creation and round-trip with Excel.

categories.title: Reports
categories.blurb: MEP strategy, site survey, option appraisal, IESVE, clash, stage 2/3 reports.

categories.title: 2D to 3D Conversion
categories.blurb: Take a flat drawing and produce a coordinated 3D model.

categories.title: Build Your Own Tool
categories.blurb: Describe a tool in plain English; BUILD X writes, compiles, tests it.

demos.title: How to navigate
demos.desc: Get oriented in the chat panel — prompts, suggestions, history.

demos.title: Designer / Build / QA / Ask modes
demos.desc: Switch between the four modes and what each one does.

demos.title: Set up Views
demos.desc: Generate per-discipline floor plans, ceiling plans and 3D views in one prompt.

demos.title: Set up Templates
demos.desc: Apply standard view templates across every view by service.

demos.title: Set up Sheets
demos.desc: Generate the full sheet set for a stage with title block, numbering and views placed.

demos.title: Set up Schedules
demos.desc: Stage-appropriate schedules per service, ready for round-trip with Excel.

demos.title: Place SVP
demos.desc: Drop a soil & vent pipe through every floor in three clicks.

demos.title: Extend Connectors
demos.desc: Stub pipes from every unconnected fitting connector at once.

demos.title: Snap to Wall
demos.desc: Snap any element flush to the nearest wall with the right offset.

demos.title: Snap Objects to Wall
demos.desc: Batch-snap a set of objects to walls without picking each one.

demos.title: Smart Notes
demos.desc: Auto-place spec notes referenced by element type and location.

demos.title: Auto Notes
demos.desc: AI-generated drafting notes from the model state.

demos.title: Smart Tagging
demos.desc: Tag every relevant element on the active view with the right tag type.

demos.title: Schedule Creator
demos.desc: Generate any schedule from a plain-English description — columns, sort, group.

demos.title: Parameter Editor
demos.desc: Bulk-edit instance and type parameters across hundreds of elements.

demos.title: Family Swap
demos.desc: Replace one family/type with another, preserving connections and parameters.

demos.title: Builderswork Tool
demos.desc: Auto-detect penetrations through walls/floors and place builderswork openings.

demos.title: Place Fan Coil Units in Room
demos.desc: Place FCUs in every room based on heat load and clearances.

demos.title: Fire Alarm Design
demos.desc: End-to-end fire alarm coverage with detector spacing rules.

demos.title: Lighting Design
demos.desc: Lux-driven layout, then placement of every fitting on the ceiling grid.

demos.title: Ventilation Design
demos.desc: Supply and extract layout with sized ductwork and grilles.

demos.title: Sprinkler Design
demos.desc: Hazard-class layout, head spacing, pipe sizing in one pass.

demos.title: Drainage Layout
demos.desc: Above-ground drainage layout from fixture units; vents and stacks routed.

demos.title: Heating & Cooling Layout
demos.desc: Plant, distribution and emitters laid out from the heat-load model.

demos.title: Pipe up Bathroom
demos.desc: Hot/cold/waste in a typical bathroom from a single prompt.

demos.title: QA Manager — Error Detection
demos.desc: Find every error in the active view; classify and explain.

demos.title: QA Manager — Clash Detection
demos.desc: Run clash detection between disciplines and against linked architecture.

demos.title: Warnings Manager
demos.desc: Triage Revit's built-in warnings, auto-resolve the safe ones.

demos.title: Check Drawings
demos.desc: QA pack across every sheet — title blocks, revisions, view scope.

demos.title: Check Specification
demos.desc: Validate the spec against the model — every element accounted for.

demos.title: Check Schedules
demos.desc: Schedules vs model gap analysis; flag missing values and rogue parameters.

demos.title: Check Revit Model
demos.desc: Model health pass — broken refs, orphaned elements, naming, links.

demos.title: ACC Clash Issues
demos.desc: Pull issues from Autodesk Construction Cloud and resolve them in Revit.

demos.title: Automated QA Checks
demos.desc: Configure stage-based QA gates that run on every save.

demos.title: Pipe Sizing Calculator
demos.desc: Size an entire pipe network from flow inputs.

demos.title: Duct Sizing Calculator
demos.desc: Size a duct network with friction-loss and velocity targets.

demos.title: Heat Loss Calculator
demos.desc: Per-room heat loss against design conditions.

demos.title: Cooling Load Calculator
demos.desc: Per-room cooling load with solar gains and occupancy.

demos.title: Lighting Calculator
demos.desc: Lumen-method calculation for any room.

demos.title: EPC / SBEM
demos.desc: Generate SBEM-compliant inputs from the model.

demos.title: SAP
demos.desc: SAP inputs and report from the model and brief.

demos.title: COBie Manager
demos.desc: Populate, validate and export COBie data.

demos.title: BIM Compliance
demos.desc: Check the model against the BEP and report gaps.

demos.title: Drawing Numbering
demos.desc: Re-number every sheet against the project numbering convention.

demos.title: Family Swapper
demos.desc: Bulk-swap families across the project to standards-compliant ones.

demos.title: Drawing Revisions
demos.desc: Issue, edit, and lock drawing revisions across the sheet set.

demos.title: Drawing Export
demos.desc: Batch-export PDFs, BCF, IFC and DWG with one prompt.

demos.title: Document Control
demos.desc: Manage the live transmittal record from inside Revit.

demos.title: Check Latest Revisions on Site
demos.desc: Compare site-issued PDFs with current model revisions; flag stale.

demos.title: MEP Specification from Revit
demos.desc: Generate an NBS-style spec direct from the modelled elements.

demos.title: Schedule Creator (deep dive)
demos.desc: Round-trip a schedule with Excel, edit in Excel, push back.

demos.title: IESVE Report Creator
demos.desc: Single SQL DB → IESVE outputs with cover sheet, charts and narrative.

demos.title: Site Survey Report
demos.desc: Turn site notes and photos into a structured report.

demos.title: MEP Strategy Report
demos.desc: Generate a Stage 2 strategy report from brief + sketch.

demos.title: Option Appraisal
demos.desc: Side-by-side comparison of design options with capital + operational cost.

demos.title: Stage 2 Report
demos.desc: RIBA Stage 2 deliverables compiled into a single report.

demos.title: Stage 3 Report
demos.desc: RIBA Stage 3 deliverables, with coordination + spec extracts.

demos.title: Clash Report
demos.desc: Issue-quality PDF + BCF clash report from the latest run.

demos.title: 2D PDF → 3D Architecture
demos.desc: Trace a PDF or DWG and produce a coordinated 3D model.

demos.title: Build Your Own Tool
demos.desc: Describe a tool in English; BUILD X writes the C#, compiles, tests, ships.
